What We Build

Practical AI for
real business problems

We don't build AI for the sake of it. Every system we deploy solves a specific, measurable pain point in your operations — and we recommend the simplest solution that gets the job done.

Service Categories

Four types of AI solutions

Not a chatbot subscription. AI that's actually built for your business, your data, your workflow.

💬

Customer-Facing Assistants

An AI assistant that knows your actual services, pricing, and policies. Handles FAQs, books appointments, qualifies leads, and responds the way you would — available 24/7 without extra staff.

Local LLM Your tone Your data
⚙️

Workflow Automation

Repetitive internal tasks that eat your time — quoting, intake, follow-ups, status updates — automated with AI that understands your process, not a generic template.

Automation Internal tools Time savings
📄

Document & Content AI

Drafting proposals, contracts, reports, and marketing content that already sounds like your brand. We configure models on your existing material so the output is ready to use, not ready to edit.

Brand voice Content Proposals
📊

Data & Reporting AI

Ask questions about your own business data in plain English and get answers. No dashboard learning curve. No data analyst on payroll. Just your numbers, explained clearly.

Analytics Plain language Private data
Local AI Deployment

Your own AI model.
Running on your terms.

Most "AI solutions" are just wrappers around ChatGPT or Claude. That means your data leaves your system, you're paying per query forever, and the AI doesn't actually know your business.

We do it differently. We deploy and configure local language models directly into your environment. The AI runs where your data lives.

  • ✓ Your data never leaves your systems. No third-party API calls with sensitive client or operational data.
  • ✓ Trained on your business. Products, services, pricing, tone, processes — the model knows your operation.
  • ✓ No ongoing per-query costs. A fixed deployment instead of a subscription that grows with usage.
  • ✓ Works offline if needed. Runs independently of internet connectivity for reliability.
  • ✓ You own the setup. Not locked into a platform. We hand it off with documentation and training.

Integration

How we connect AI to your existing stack

Website & Booking Systems Embed directly into your site — Squarespace, WordPress, Wix, custom builds
CRM & Job Management ServiceTitan, HubSpot, JobBer, Salesforce, and others via API
Internal Tools & Files Google Drive, SharePoint, Notion, your own databases — AI that reads what you already have
Communication Platforms Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Instagram DMs
Custom-Built Platforms / APIs If you have a proprietary system, we'll build the connector
By Industry

AI ideas for your specific business

Here are the most common and highest-value AI use cases we've built across the industries we serve. Your discovery call will surface what's right for you.

💰

AI Estimate Generator

Client submits job details via a form; AI generates a draft quote based on your pricing rules — ready for your review in seconds.

📅

Scheduling Assistant

AI chatbot handles appointment booking, rescheduling, and reminders via SMS or your website — 24 hours a day.

📝

Job Summary Generator

Technician completes a job; AI generates a polished, client-facing summary report from field notes.

📬

Invoice Follow-Up Automation

AI drafts and sends follow-up messages for unpaid invoices on a schedule — so nothing slips through.

🔍

Supplier Price Monitor

AI scans supplier emails or websites and flags price changes against your reference list automatically.

Don't see your exact use case? Let's talk — we'll identify the right solution for your operation.

Start a Conversation
💬

AI Booking Assistant

Conversational chatbot for booking appointments, answering service questions, and upselling add-ons — 24/7.

⭐

Review Response Generator

AI drafts professional, personalized responses to Google and Yelp reviews for your team to approve and post.

📲

Client Rebooking Campaigns

AI identifies clients who haven't booked in 60+ days and drafts personalized outreach messages automatically.

✍️

Menu / Service Describer

AI generates compelling descriptions for new menu items or services from your bullet-point notes.

📊

Booking Analytics Briefing

Weekly plain-language summary of booking trends, no-show rates, and peak times delivered to ownership.

Not on this list? Your business is unique — book a discovery call and we'll map it out together.

Start a Conversation
🏡

Listing Description Writer

Provide property details and AI generates a polished, MLS-ready listing description in your brand voice.

🎯

Lead Qualifier Chatbot

AI asks qualifying questions to website visitors and routes hot leads to the right agent via email or SMS.

📃

Document Summarizer

AI reads lengthy contracts, leases, or reports and produces a plain-language summary — in minutes.

📧

Client Update Drafter

AI generates weekly client update emails based on notes entered by your team — keeping clients informed effortlessly.

❓

FAQ Knowledge Base Bot

AI answers common client questions from your firm's own documents — accurately, 24 hours a day.

Every firm is different. Book a call and we'll scope exactly what fits your practice.

Start a Conversation
🛒

Product Description Generator

AI generates SEO-optimized product descriptions from your specs and images at scale.

🤖

Customer Support Bot

AI handles order status, returns, and FAQ inquiries — and escalates complex issues to your team automatically.

📦

Inventory Alert Summarizer

AI reads your inventory reports and sends a plain-language daily briefing to ownership each morning.

🛍️

Abandoned Cart Recovery

AI generates personalized abandoned cart recovery emails based on what was left in the cart.

📱

Social Caption Generator

AI writes post captions for new products or promotions from a few quick notes — ready to post.

Running a specific platform like Shopify or WooCommerce? Let's talk about what we can build for it.

Start a Conversation
